description: outstanding tasks split into waiting-on-the-brand versus creator I-owe, each citing its source and due date
assertions: tasks where the brand owes the next action appear under waiting_on
tasks where the creator owes the next action appear under i_owe
every item carries its due date, responsible party, and source citation
the atom is read-only and creates no tasks

description: tasks past their due date surface under overdue with aging
assertions: a task past its due date appears under overdue
each overdue item reports how many days it has aged
aging is computed from the cited due date, not estimated

description: a deal with no outstanding tasks returns an honest empty split
assertions: waiting_on_counterparty and i_owe are both empty when nothing is outstanding
the note states there is nothing outstanding
no placeholder or invented task fills the empty result
